final_prompt.prompt:
Create an editorial banner photo for Weibo news/hot-topic feature, 16:9 aspect ratio, documentary street photography style.

Style/medium: photorealistic documentary street photography, mobile-captured aesthetic with professional polish, sharp detail
Composition: wide panoramic horizontal banner, 16:9 aspect ratio, generous negative space for text overlay, city street level viewpoint
Subject: silhouettes of pedestrians walking briskly in foreground, motion blur suggesting haste
Scene/backdrop: urban skyline at dusk, skyscrapers in distance reflecting golden sunset glow, neon signs beginning to illuminate
Lighting/mood: dramatic chiaroscuro contrast, warm golden hour sunlight fading into cool blue twilight, strong light/shadow interplay
Color palette: warm amber and gold from sunset as anchor, cool cyan and magenta from neon as accent, deep blue shadows
Text (verbatim): "城市里的安静时刻", "黄昏，总能治愈一天的匆忙", "@龙爪槐守望者real · 生活观察"
Constraints: horizontal panoramic format with ample negative space for headline placement; text must be clearly readable; professional news editorial quality
Avoid: 8K stuffer words, over-processed HDR look, artificial sharpening artifacts, watermark as graphic element, stock photo generic aesthetic, cluttered composition
